programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Finding Amy
programme.desc: In Portland Maine, a young woman named Amy St. Laurent goes out one evening with friends. At a bar she meets a stranger named Jeff.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Decoy Dolly
programme.desc: Late one evening in suburban Louisiana, a young carpenter offers a lift home to a women he’s met in a bar. But after riding off with the stranger in his truck, Andre disappears into the night.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: River Rat
programme.desc: An elderly widow is brutally murdered in her small town Louisiana home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 2
programme.desc: Most Haunted continues its investigation into the Judges Lodgings where the team seem to be under attack and something is trying to get through a door…but what?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 1
programme.desc: The team venture into a cottage where it is said ‘no living soul can endure living there’. With cursed dolls, murder and suicide this derelict place has everything to fear.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.desc: A new neighbor helps several Camdens – and their friends – in distress.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.desc: A respectable rancher and his son hang an innocent man and let a bewhiskered bounty hunter go on trial for the murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Irreplaceable Lautrec and Gauguin art works mysteriously vanish from a millionaire's private collection despite three fail-safe electronic security systems.

programme.desc: The Sliders land in a world where internal combustion engines are outlawed; Mallory (Robert Floyd) falls for an employee (guest star Lisa Akey) of a major gas company and leader of an outlaw biker gang.

programme.title: Moesha: The Player

programme.title: Moesha: All Grown Up

programme.title: Moesha: Run, Mo, Run
programme.desc: An ex-con is after Moesha, and Dorian decides to search for his birth mother.

programme.title: Moesha: Mom
programme.desc: Dorian finds his mom, but it’s Moesha who ends up getting hurt.

programme.title: Moesha: That's My Moma
programme.desc: Dorian thought finding his mom would provide answers, not raise more questions (Lil Bow Wow guest stars).

programme.title: Moesha: What If...
programme.desc: Niecy spins a fantasy about what Moesha’s life would be like if her mom raised her instead of Frank.

programme.title: Moesha: Scary Marriage
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are matched up in a mock marriage for a homework assignment.

programme.title: Moesha: Saving Private Rita

programme.title: Moesha: Mayhem At The Jam

programme.title: Moesha: Creepin’
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship heats up, while Dorian dates an older woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Nicki (Leah Remini) returns to start her new life in the city, disrupting Stuart's professional life and Phil's personal life. Haskell and Eden attend an all-nude production of "Twelve Angry Men."

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Dark Waters
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.desc: He faked his own credentials and netted $400,000 of taxpayers money, giving bogus court testimony and investigative services.

programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con
programme.desc: The pair pulled off the biggest art con of the 20th Century, passing off works painted by Myatt as genuine works by famous artists.

programme.desc: A powerful light ray from an ancient temple knocks Professor Challenger unconscious. As the explorers try and save him, he occupies an alternate reality in his mind where he has godlike powers.

programme.title: The Lost World: Camelot
programme.desc: In the process of trying to save Marguerite from being betrothed to a teenage king, Malone must face a T-Rex with only a sword and Roxton must joust against Vordred.

programme.title: The Lost World: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: Challenger comes face to face with an old friend from England, Dr. William Hargrove. Summerlee, Malone, and Marguerite agree to help the Queen of the nymphs and fairies break a curse.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: Determined not to let his child be born into a world at war, John Crichton puts himself at the center of the conflict.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E1 - Premiere
programme.desc: Astronaut John Crichton attempts to propel his module at high speeds but is hit by a radiation wave and is sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E2 - Exodus From Genesis
programme.desc: A locator beacon, automatically broadcasting its exact location to any Peacekeeper forces in the area.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E3 - Back And Back And Back To The Future
programme.desc: The crew rescues a scientist and his assistant from a disintegrating ship.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 10
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do frozen chickens cause more damage than thawed chickens when shot at a plane's windshield? Did a man die trying to compact his laundry in the washing machine by standing on it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 62
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a machine designed by Nikola Tesla actually create a miniature earthquake or collapse a structure? Can a lava lamp explode if heated on the stove?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 194
programme.desc: Can a bullet ricochet off pavement and up through a car's floorboard, as seen in "Burn Notice"? Can you ride an explosion's shock wave to jump farther than you can under your own power?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 113
programme.desc: Can a ninja catch an arrow mid-flight? Could a ninja hide underwater breathing through a bamboo reed long enough to attack an enemy with a poison blow-dart?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 200
programme.desc: Can a trench with perfect 90-degree corners absorb an explosion's shockwave inside the trench better than a trench with rounded corners?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Stay Out of My Threesome!
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next, Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Know About the Affair, But Is He the Father?
programme.desc: Stephanie gave birth to a baby boy and believes Brandon is the father. But Brandon claims he didn't find out about the child until three years later and denies being the father. Stephanie and her mother want Brandon to step up.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: As the teams prepare for their sixth dinner, chef Ramsay tells them that each team must create its own menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The wannabe chefs must combine their skills and work as individuals for the first time. The prize is a trip with Chef Ramsay to get a taste of the restaurant at the Red Rock Casino Resort.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must create a meal fit for service in 15 minutes out of a tray of leftovers from the previous night.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final three contestants must serve an entire dining room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay divides Hell's Kitchen between the two remaining contestants, who design a decor and a menu, then come up with names for their halves.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twelve aspirants try to impress Gordon Ramsay, as they compete for the post of head chef at a Las Vegas restaurant.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Greenough, near Geraldton in Western Australia, some 400 kilometres north of Perth, will forever be associated with one the most horrific murders in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Taken for a Ride

programme.title: Operation Repo: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All in the Family

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Courage

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Boot Camp
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today, Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Friends and Neighbors
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Set-Up
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: The Game: When The Chickens Come Home To Roost, Part II

programme.title: Run's House: Age Against The Machine

programme.title: Run's House: Operation Album Drop

programme.title: Run's House: That Guy

programme.title: Run's House: Say Hello To My Little Friend

programme.title: Run's House: Run's Big House
programme.desc: Rev and family rally around JoJo after he gets busted for possession of marijuana.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Most Aggressive Breeds

programme.desc: A Border Collie/Greyhound mix develops dog aggression; an inherited pooch who was raised "Cesar's Way" loses his confidence; and 150 pound Leonberger, Madison, is like a bull in a china shop.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.201

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.43
programme.desc: Teenager steals mother's checkbook, buys car; parents sue custom shop owner/Woman sues ex-lover for leaving her for mother of his child; he claims bitterness, she alleges owed money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.241
programme.desc: A man describes his relationship as "friends with benefits" with a woman who claims she lent him money for living expenses. A woman sues her former live-in boyfriend for home renovation costs and furniture expenses.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.63
programme.desc: Woman locks daughter out, sues for unpaid rent; daughter countersues for damages citing illegal eviction. Man denies owing ex-girlfriend for uninsured motorcycle he totaled, despite $17,000 pay-off amount left on co-signed vehicle.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.15
programme.desc: Ex live-in lovers fight over a truck repossession, a large co-signed loan, and insurance/After an arrest for stealing a lawnmower, a man is allegedly bailed out by his girlfriend who claims she helped pay for his gall bladder surgery.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.6
programme.desc: Teen catfight leads to adult feud over truck vandalism/Teen crashes car after drunk 17-year-old allegedly permits him, sued by her father.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.158
programme.desc: College students sue ex-friend over lease break. Woman denies child support responsibility if son not living with her; grandmother sues for medical bills.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.28
programme.desc: Denying they sold their friends a lemon, a man and his fiancée sue for slander and harassment/A black Labrador bites an 8-year-old in the face; the child’s mother sues a friend for the cost of plastic surgery to repair the wound.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.135
programme.desc: Shady car salesman sacked for BMW lease scam; dealership owner denies fault. Two women brawl over car keying amid infidelity claims against shared ex.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.82
programme.desc: Two sisters sue a family member for allegedly selling their third sister’s belongings at a garage sale while she was incarcerated/An allegedly unpaid loan for breast augmentation further divides a woman and her estranged daughter-in-law.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.140
programme.desc: Older couple accuses daughter and stepson-in-law of abuse including unpaid loans and theft; young couple denies. Man denies responsibility for drunk driving accident, claims friend knew he was intoxicated.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Two men convicted for a brutal rape they say they didn’t commit, and DNA evidence backs them up. How did a law professor, her students and new DNA technology play a part in the case?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Buried Secrets of Las Vegas
programme.desc: A report on the death of gaming tycoon Ted Binion, who was found dead in his Las Vegas home. Paranoid about his wealth, he stashed millions of dollars’ worth of silver in a hidden vault in Pahrump, Nevada.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Choice
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The War in Chicago
programme.desc: The street violence, gang activity and drug trafficking in Chicago.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dirty Little Secrets
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Chicago

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In 2010, NBA player Lorenzen Wright is reported missing. Investigators search for him in the scorching Memphis heat for over a week before finding his mummified remains in a field.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: For years a violent predator lurks around Nashville, attacking women in their homes on rainy nights. Investigators' biggest clue is the weather pattern.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In February 1972, police are called to the home of Bryce and Virginia Durham, where they find the couple and their son strangled and partially submerged in their bathtub.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Two cases of domestic abuse: Patricia Birmingham in the US and Marta Chmielecka in the UK, both killed by their partners, reveal the deadly consequences of toxic relationships.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Kira Steger's murder by her husband and Whitney Gray's fatal road rage shooting reveal the devastating toll of violence both in relationships and on the open road.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her car by her estranged husband in front of her daughter. In the US, a Vietnam veteran is shot at home by his son over a will dispute.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Bonny Lee Bakley is shot to death outside a neighborhood Italian restaurant in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Rockhampton Rapist
programme.desc: In the late 1990s, a string of disappearances in Rockhampton, Queensland left police searching for a killer they couldn't identify.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2001, a seven-year-old girl was abducted on her way to school in Greeley, Colorado, by a stranger who sexually abused her and then released her. Despite all efforts, the perpetrator could not be found for almost 20 years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young prostitute is found dead in an Ohio waterway. Authorities have one tiny clue which could point to her killer, but face huge challenges due to her policemen clients and DNA evidence being washed away.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1990, a woman in Rankin County, Mississippi, was kidnapped and raped at knifepoint, but the case went cold for decades until a DNA match from an unrelated crime identified the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1972, a young woman was discovered covered in blood by the road in Snohomish County, in the US state of Washington, and passed away a short time after being taken to hospital.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In a small South Carolina town in 1991, 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd, a popular high school student, was raped, murdered and dumped in a deserted field. With few leads, authorities DNA tested several friends and the match was a shock to all.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman vanished from her home on Prince Edward Island. Her abandoned car was found in a field; inside, the windows were spattered with blood. During the search for her body, police found a plastic bag containing a sneakers and a leather jacket.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984, hundreds of people in Oregon became ill with food poisoning. Detectives tracked down the outbreak to a cult which aimed to use germ warfare to take down the government.

programme.title: Pointless: Episode 68

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Amazing Man
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All the Colors of the Heart
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Why Punish the Children?
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dream of Wild Horses
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: In With the "In" Crowd
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Buried Secrets Of Mount Cook
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Hot Spots
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs, where objects return to the skies again and again, as if taunting witnesses below.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Close Encounters
programme.desc: There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Aftermath
programme.desc: Those surviving the massacre in Moldavia are separated and held at the palace; Krystle and Alexis are imprisoned in the palace dungeon; Sammy Jo reveals her scheme to Rita; Fallon, suffering from amnesia, reacts to seeing the name Colby.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Homecoming
programme.desc: Blake secures the release of Krystle and Alexis, and the families return from Moldavia; Luke is buried; Rita's boyfriend Joel is anxious to help Sammy Jo further her scheme; Alexis is preoccupied with Galen's welfare; Fallon tells Miles she has amnesia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Californians
programme.desc: Blake receives a business proposition from Jason Colby, whom he hasn't seen in 20 years; Jeff's Aunt Constance summons him to California; the State Department questions Blake; Rita undergoes plastic surgery to complete her 'Krystle Look.'

programme.title: Dynasty: The Man
programme.desc: Krystle makes a surprise visit to Sammy Jo in New York; Adam follows Claudia to San Francisco; Constance awards nephew Jeff 50% of Colby Enterprises; Dominique is paid a visit by a mysterious man from her past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gown
programme.desc: Alexis learns Galen is alive in Moldavia; Jeff plans to move to California; Adam and Claudia are married; Krystle pays a surprise visit to Sammy Jo and spots her double, Rita.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Commerce Raiders
programme.desc: Heavily armed vessels disguised as ordinary cargo ships patrolled allied waters, sinking supply boats and stealing their content.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Germany
programme.desc: The development of the B-17 bomber, which allowed American planes to reach inside Germany and bomb its cities.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Paris enlists Nev and Max to help her figure out who has been catfishing her for the past four years. But as the guys investigate, they make a shocking discovery. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Theo's 'Down Under' Dilemma
programme.desc: Theo is left devastated after Kaz's departure and his relationship with KC comes to a head. Lockie and Sofie fall out and a new ex ruffles some feathers! (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 209
programme.desc: Ryan's is crushing on his best friend Taylor and must let her know. Ashley wonders if she should tell her friend, Colin, that she has feelings for him.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 108
programme.desc: Angelica attempts to steal her best friend John away from his current girlfriend. Shivani reveals her true feelings to BFF Parth.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 214
programme.desc: Megan tells her best friend and roommate how much she likes him. Joey is ready for more than just friendship with Bebo.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 201
programme.desc: Yohamna is in love with her best friend James. Joe can't wait to let his best friend Lacey know he has feelings for her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 221

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 113
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 220
programme.desc: Reality dating series. Mary Kate reveals that she's in love with her best friend. Stephanie will finally confess her true feelings for her best friend. (S2, ep20)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 122
programme.desc: Melita must tell Marcus how she feels before he leaves for the military. Gaming nerd Brian, tells Samantha that he's in love with her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 222
programme.desc: Robin is ready to tell his best friend Chelsey, that he likes her. Tyler's been crushing on his best friend Lauren and is finally ready to let her know.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Butterfly
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci takes Bentley to a counsellor, Catelynn and Tyler reunite with Carly, Mackenzie gets devastating news, Cheyenne addresses Taylor's racist tweets, and Amber is arrested. (S8, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Half Empty Half Full
programme.desc: Leah plans a 2nd birthday party for the girls, Chelsea convinces her dad to help her move, Kieffer comes crashing back into Jenelle's life, and Kailyn meets a cute new boy named Javi. (S3, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breakdown
programme.desc: Leah and Jeremy get serious, while Chelsea breaks down on Adam's birthday. Jenelle questions if Andrew is really Jace's, while Kailyn is asked out on a date. (S3, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: A Means To An End
programme.desc: Leah has some big news for Corey, while Chelsea gets ready for beauty school. Jenelle goes through with the paternity test while Kailyn and Jo get into a huge fight over his new girlfriend. (S3, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look back at the hilarious highs and the difficult lows never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the third season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Finale Special: Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live audience. Jenelle sits down with Jace's dad for the first time in years and Chelsea continues to hold on to Adam despite her father's frustrations.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Heinrich Himmler
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler: Largely due to the SS which he led, Himmler, the unsuspecting killer, was the most powerful of all of Hitler's men.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Josef Goebbels
programme.desc: Josef Goebbels: A unique documentary looking at the role of Goebbels, a man from Hitler's inner circle.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Waffen-SS
programme.desc: The Waffen-SS: Masqueraded as military excellence, the reality was very different. Recruits were poorly trained and remorse was nonexistent, as SS troops killed mercilessly.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The SS Death Head's Unit
programme.desc: The SS Death Head's Unit: Tasked with guarding concentration camps, this unit's actions knew no bounds, and, despite their heinous acts, still attended social gatherings.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: Unrepentant: The SS And Its Myth After 1945
programme.desc: Unrepentant: The SS and Its Myth After 1945: Drawing a line to the present, the atrocities of the SS are beyond all doubt, yet, there is a cult surrounding 'old comrades' today.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The World At War
programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Richard Sharpe: A Harvard Killing
programme.desc: The story of a Harvard grad who killed his wife when she learned he was moonlighting as a cross-dresser.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rogers Pass

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Elk Dummy
programme.desc: Montana game wardens deploy elk decoys across the state in hopes of catching would-be poachers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with a missing child who was last seen dragged off by a bear... good thing it's only a training excercise. Meanwhile it's opening season for shed antler hunters and the wardens have their hands full!

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Water Rescue
programme.desc: This week, a couple of wardens face off with early season anglers over gaming laws while other wardens get trained in open water rescue techniques.

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka: Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Malaysia: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Malaysia's animals and plants have exploited every opportunity to carve out an existence and so have adapted to some very strange ways of life.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Madagascar: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: Madagascar is truly a weird and wonderful land. Isolated on an island of extreme and magical looking locations, life has adapted and diversified. With few predators, numbers have proliferated and natural selection has gone mad.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Cambodia: The Water Kingdom
programme.desc: Cambodia's wildlife and climate is ruled by the monsoon cycle. It is a wild land of extreme rains, raging rivers and flooding lakes that create great challenges for its animals, and a fine balance between seasons.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life
programme.desc: While lost in the woods, McGee, Gretchen, Squirt and Sawyer discover a creepy cabin.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Eclipsalypso / Apocalypse Squirt
programme.desc: McGee summons the Moon Dervish who will bring the Apocalypse unless a sasquatch dances for him.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bite of the Buttsquat / Sword of Ittibiticus
programme.desc: No one believes McGee's suspicion that the suddenly ultra-cool Buttsquat is a campyre.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome

programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei duels the top dog at The Facility using Yanagi's treasure deck. Meanwhile, Jack learns about the mystery surrounding his Mark of the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fire It Up!
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: When Yusei can't remember his own name, he agrees to duel a pint-sized player named Leo in the hopes of getting his memory back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: As Leo and his pal Dexter venture into the narrows of New Domino City to find the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose, Blister breaks out a plan to keep Yusei's friends in the Satellite Sector safe from Goodwin's goons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Welcome to the Fortune Cup
programme.desc: The stage is set for the Fortune Cup as eight elite duelists vie for the chance to take on reigning champion Jack Atlas. However, for the Master of Ceremonies Rex Goodwin, it's not about who wins or loses.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Mississippi Duck

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Zombie Awakes

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: While vacationing in the canals of Venice, Danger Mouse and Penfold bump into a highway undergoing construction, being built by Baron Greenback, who holds a document that allows him to construct whatever he wants.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Arthur: Popular Girls/Buster's Growing Grudge
programme.desc: Sue Ellen and Fern take a popularity quiz in a magazine and change their personalities to become more likable, but it backfires. And Buster's convinced that his great joke will be the difference between a successful oral report and failure.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Paradise Lost/The Pride of Lakewood
programme.desc: Baby Kate is growing up! But strangely enough, the more words she learns, the less she seems to understand their dog. To boost school spirit, Arthur and his classmates form the Lakewood Pride Committee, but not everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Room to Ride/The Frensky Family Fiasco
programme.desc: With Lance Armstrong’s support, Binky and his friends take to the streets to convince residents to vote for new bike safety lanes. Francine wants the Frenskys to be closer, but a weekly Family Night turns out to be harder than expected.

programme.title: Arthur: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: Arthur: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny
programme.desc: Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time
programme.desc: Red Alert becomes concerned at the desperate measures Hot Shot is taking to beat Override, while Vector Prime and the kids travel to the Sahara in search of the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep
programme.desc: Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a Spanish girl play her violin for her friends. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies watch Po dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go up the slide to see two children help mend a dry stone wall. A wall appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Po and Tinky Winky play a game with the wall. They hear Dipsy coming and hide behind the wall.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Laa-Laa burst out of the house, dance, have a big hug and go back inside, they do it again until the windmill announces the animals marching through Teletubbyland. Dipsy and Po burst out of the house, dance, have a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk in sideways, then run off to watch a little boy play cricket with his dad. In Teletubbyland,Tinky Winky runs away with Laa-Laa’s ball. Laa-Laa chases after him, through the house, over the hills and behind the trees.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love jump, but they stop to see Andy Brown and some children take a trip on a boat to see Funghi the Dolphin. The Teletubbies are out in Teletubbyland. When they meet each other, they say hello, making sure no-one is missed out.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children are showing us their park where they play. A see-saw appears in Teletubbyland. Dipsy and Laa-Laa play on the see-saw.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. They watch a boy and his grandad building a barbecue. A voice trumpet brings a message that makes the Teletubbies laugh and run away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message that makes Laa-Laa laugh. The Teletubbies watch some children learning about the number one. The Teletubbies take turns to wear the skirt.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a hello and goodbye game in the hills. They watch a little boy look for a chameleon in the garden

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is about to declare his Sunflower Oil business open, but there’s just one more job that he needs Bob to do. He needs a depot to store all the bottles of oil.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Roads and Bridges
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Bob is going On Site! Join Bob and his Can-Do crew as they explore real life construction sites. See diggers, mixers and trucks work together to build roads and bridges.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has promised to put a cat flap in his kitchen door for Pilchard, but he gets an urgent call from Farmer Pickles who needs a fence built to keep the rabbits out of his lettuce field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing a new pizza oven for Mr Sabatini, while Wendy lays a cycle lane in town. Mr Bentley has brought some Stop/Go signs to hold up the traffic while she works, but there is no-one to operate these with him – except Spud!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Spud is collecting some eggs for breakfast, he spots the large amount of straw delivered the previous day and overhears Bob and Farmer Pickles having a conversation. They discuss how they are making “something new out of straw”.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Bentley are moving house, and Bob is carrying out a loft conversion at their new home. Mr Bentley greets Bob and his team, then leaves for work. The removal company call to say that they have several staff off with flu.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Sabatini have asked Bob to convert a local house into a delicatessen. Unfortunately for Roley, there is no rolling to be done. The gang leaves to get on with the job and Roley decides to tag along just in case.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys’, while Wendy goes to JJ’s yard with Lofty and Dizzy to collect a steel joist and other materials. Lofty is nervous about carrying the joist, but Dizzy and Trix race off with the bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 2

programme.title: Most Haunted: Birmingham Central

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.
